events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`. Summary: missing bushing on RMC terminations violates NEC 344.46, which requires a bushing to protect conductors from abrasion where RMC enters a box/enclosure. Marked `fail` (medium risk since caught while staged, before conductors are pulled) with corrective action to install proper bushings before proceeding.
